summary: Light/Dark Mode Feature - All tests passed. Default dark mode loads, toggle on More page switches to light mode, theme persists across all 5 tabs (Inbox, Contacts, Keypad, Team, More), toggle back to dark mode works correctly. Gold accent (#C9A962) preserved in light mode.
critical_code_review_comments: themeStore.ts properly defines COLORS.dark and COLORS.light with all necessary color tokens
_layout.tsx loads theme on mount via useEffect calling loadTheme()
(tabs)/_layout.tsx uses themeStore colors for tab bar styling
more.tsx has Appearance section with Switch component using data-testid='theme-toggle-switch'
inbox.tsx uses themeMode to switch between COLORS_LIGHT/COLORS_DARK
contacts.tsx uses colors from useThemeStore for container, search, and items
dialer.tsx uses colors from useThemeStore for buttons and display
team.tsx uses colors from useThemeStore for channel list and search
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/Dark mode feature fully implemented and tested. Toggle is in More page under Appearance section. Theme persists via AsyncStorage. Uses Zustand store at /app/frontend/store/themeStore.ts

verified: Dark mode loads by default on first visit
Toggle from dark to light works
Toggle from light to dark works
Label changes between Dark Mode and Light Mode
Icon changes between moon and sun
Gold accent (#C9A962) preserved on toggle track
Dark text for titles and messages
Themed search bar with light gray background
Dark text for names and phones
Light mode persists after navigating to Inbox
Light mode persists after navigating to Contacts
Light mode persists after navigating to Keypad
Light mode persists after navigating to Team
Light mode persists after returning to More
Dark mode returns when toggle clicked again
